title: Token tracking fix — agent endpoints
description: Switched agent endpoints from _PROBLEM_RE to _ID_RE_LOOSE so all dataset problem IDs are accepted. Added 'dataset' query param threaded through to issue storage. Root cause: _PROBLEM_RE blocked all non-q1–q10 IDs, causing zero token logging.

title: Solvability evaluation with Claude Sonnet
description: Created webapp/solvability_eval.py. Calls claude CLI per-problem, caches result in documents/questions/{qid}/solvability_eval.json. Evaluates score 0–100, confidence, reasoning, key_obstacles, positive_factors, estimated_proof_length. Background thread ensures_all_evaluated at startup.

title: Solvability detail panel + curated labels
description: Added clickable solvability cell in Overview grid that expands an inline accordion showing Opus reasoning, obstacles (red), and positive factors (green). Added _Q_LABELS dict with curated tags for q1–q10, shown as chips in the grid rows and the focused question panel.

title: README — Karpathy autoresearch acknowledgement
description: Added acknowledgement of Andrej Karpathy's autoresearch project (https://github.com/karpathy/autoresearch) as conceptual inspiration for RMA's autonomous solver pipeline.

title: Literature tab — per-question paper tracker
description: Created webapp/literature.py with paper storage in documents/questions/{qid}/literature/index.json. Added /api/literature/* routes. New Literature tab in UI shows paper list with relevance badges, full abstract, and editable research notes saved via PATCH.

title: Concepts tab — per-question concept/notation cards
description: Created webapp/concepts.py with concept storage in documents/questions/{qid}/concepts.json. Added /api/concepts/* routes. New Concepts tab in UI shows color-coded cards (core/background/notation/theorem) with name, LaTeX notation, definition, example, related concepts. MathJax typeset on render.

title: Pre-extraction at startup — literature and concepts
description: Added ensure_all_lit() and ensure_all_concepts() background threads at server startup. Both run sequentially over q1–q10, skipping questions that already have data. Removed interactive 'Discover with AI' / 'Generate with AI' buttons from UI — extraction is fully automatic.

title: Dev Log tab
description: Created webapp/devlog.py (append-only JSONL storage). Added /api/devlog GET route. Added Dev Log tab to the UI showing all change entries in reverse-chronological order with timestamp, title, description, signature, and changed-file chips. Seeded with 7 retroactive entries for this session.

title: Sync README_zh.md — Karpathy acknowledgement
description: Added missing Karpathy autoresearch acknowledgement to README_zh.md, matching the English README. Also saved memory rule to always keep README_zh.md in sync with README.md going forward.
